mapper.select: /* adm-menu-searchcondition-sql-oracle.xml - selectSearchConditionCount */ SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TADMIN_MST_USSC_HD

/* adm-menu-searchcondition-sql-oracle.xml - selectSearchConditionList */
SELECT '0' AS CHK , USSCHDKEY , USSCHDNM , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY AS INSERTURNAME , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY AS UPDATEURNAME FROM TADMIN_MST_USSC_HD
